title: Pre-meditation page layout adjustments and ReflectionPhase component extraction

requirements.text: Move the MindfulnessGuide section to the bottom of the pre-meditation setup phase layout, below all other controls.

quotes: Put meditation guide at the bottom of the page

acceptanceCriteria: In the pre-meditation setup phase, the MindfulnessGuide container appears below the combined session controls container.
All other pre-meditation controls (meditation carousel, duration, ambient sound, buttons) appear above the MindfulnessGuide.

requirements.text: In the MindfulnessGuide component, center the title at the top of its container. The title must read '[MeditationType] Meditation Guide' where [MeditationType] is the currently selected meditation type from the carousel (dynamic).

quotes: the title saying '<Meditation> Meditation Guide' should be at the top center and not top left of its container
Text written in <> is dynamic meditation picked from the carousel

acceptanceCriteria: The MindfulnessGuide title is horizontally centered within its container.
The title text dynamically reflects the currently selected meditation type (e.g., 'Mindfulness Meditation Guide', 'Metta Meditation Guide').
The title is positioned at the top of the MindfulnessGuide container.

requirements.text: In the MindfulnessGuide component, move the 'More Details' button to the bottom center of its container.

quotes: have more details button at the bottom center of its container

acceptanceCriteria: The 'More Details' button is positioned at the bottom of the MindfulnessGuide container.
The 'More Details' button is horizontally centered within the container.

requirements.text: On the pre-meditation setup phase, group the Duration slider (DurationRangeInput), Ambient Sound Picker (AmbientMusicCarousel), and the Begin/Save Ritual action buttons into a single unified container with consistent styling.

quotes: combine, duration, ambient sound picker, and begin with save ritual buttons, inside a single container

acceptanceCriteria: Duration, Ambient Sound Picker, and Begin/Save Ritual buttons are wrapped in one container element.
The container has consistent card/panel styling matching the rest of the pre-meditation page (e.g., bg-card/60 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl border border-border/50).
All three sections remain functional within the combined container.

requirements.text: Extract the reflection phase JSX from PreMeditationPage into a standalone ReflectionPhase component (frontend/src/pages/ReflectionPage.tsx or frontend/src/components/ReflectionPhase.tsx). The component must accept as props all required state and callbacks: selectedType, duration, selectedMoods, handleMoodToggle, selectedEnergy, setSelectedEnergy, reflection, setReflection, isFavorite, setIsFavorite, handleSaveReflection, recordSession.isPending, createJournalEntry.isPending, and a navigate/onBack handler. The component renders: session complete header, mood selection grid, energy level selection grid, reflection textarea, favorite checkbox, and Save & Continue button. Replace the inline reflection phase block in PreMeditationPage with `<ReflectionPhase ... />`.

quotes: create a separate component for reflection phase, just like you did previously for meditation guide container creating a <MindfulnessGuide/> separate component, do the same for reflection too
it should be replaced with: if (phase === 'reflection') { return <ReflectionPage/>}

acceptanceCriteria: A new ReflectionPhase component file exists and contains the full reflection phase UI (mood grid, energy grid, reflection textarea, favorite checkbox, Save & Continue button).
PreMeditationPage's reflection phase block is replaced with a single `<ReflectionPhase ... />` invocation.
The ReflectionPhase component receives all state and callbacks as props from PreMeditationPage.
The ReflectionPhase component wraps its content in PageBackgroundShell with StandardPageNav, matching the original layout.
Saving a reflection still works end-to-end (records session, creates journal entry, navigates away).

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not alter backend logic or data models.
Preserve all existing functionality of the pre-meditation flow (setup, active, reflection phases).
nonGoals: Adding new meditation types or backend data models.
Changing the active meditation (timer) phase UI.
Modifying the dashboard or any page other than PreMeditationPage and the new ReflectionPhase component.
